title: B Team Lite
description:
A combination of 120+ mods, resource packs, and shaders for my friends and I to play; a lighter version of B Team.

This is a Vanilla+ style modpack, adding things like immersive aircraft, better end, better nether, dungeons and taverns, and create.
body:
This modpack is a lighter version of B Team Official 1.20.1. It aims to reduce loads on computers so that more of my friends can access and play the modpack with me. It's a Vanilla+ style, adding quality of life, visual, and exploration improvements. I do not own any of these mods. This is strictly a culmination of the ones I personally like to play.

Most mods cater to exploration overhauls, such as dungeons and taverns, better nether, better end, etc. Quality of life improvements include mouse tweaks, better combat, create, etc. I've also added some horror mods like cave dweller and man from the fog. In the future, I'll add things like Farmer's delight. There's some building improvements as well, mainly pulling from Macaw's add ons (windows, walls, furniture, etc.)

All mods, resource packs, and shaders are pulled directly from Modrinth's browser. The only modification made was to Man From The Fog Reimagined by Zenolth. I added 90 seconds of silence before and after every "nightambience" .ogg sound file (1-6) to reduce how often the audio plays. I do not own nor take credit for any of these mods, nor do I intend to make profit. This is strictly for the enjoyment of my friends and I.
